message:
fix(packs/system/disk): close quote-bypass on mount --bind and nbd-client

Same quote-bypass class as chmod/chown: `mount --bind src "/"` and
`nbd-client host 1234 "/dev/nbd0"` would slip past the patterns that
required the path to follow whitespace directly. Shell unquotes both
to the unquoted form before the syscall sees them. Added optional
`['"]?` before the leading `/`.
